name: Chicago Debt Solutions
description_short: Law Offices of David Freydin provides bankruptcy and student loan relief services through two Chicago-area locations, offering free consultations and 20+ years of experience.
description_long:
Law Offices of David Freydin operates as a bankruptcy law firm serving the Chicago metropolitan area with two convenient office locations in Skokie and Chicago. The firm is headed by Attorney David Freydin and specializes in helping individuals navigate financial distress through legal remedies. The company's website identifies it as operating under the brand name presented, though the actual legal entity is Law Offices of David Freydin.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, student loan relief and negotiation, creditor harassment defense, and debt relief alternatives. They provide free initial case evaluations to prospective clients and claim to have successfully handled hundreds of bankruptcy cases. Additional services include assistance with foreclosure prevention, wage garnishment defense, and car repossession prevention.

The firm distinguishes itself through several stated commitments: over 20 years of attorney experience, personal attention to each client, timely communication via phone and email, preparation for court hearings, two office locations for accessibility, and aggressive creditor harassment protection. The website emphasizes client testimonials and reviews as evidence of service quality.

As a legal services provider, this firm requires clients to have genuine financial distress qualifying for bankruptcy relief. The primary limitation is geographic—services are restricted to the Chicago area. Additionally, while the website makes broad claims about experience and success rates, specific case outcomes, attorney credentials, or disciplinary history are not detailed on the website provided.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free, no-obligation initial consultations to evaluate eligibility and options
Over 20 years of attorney experience in bankruptcy and debt relief matters
Two convenient office locations (Skokie and Chicago) for in-person meetings
Explicitly promises aggressive protection against creditor harassment and collection calls
Provides specialized student loan relief services including deferment, forbearance, consolidation, and discharge options
Claims to prepare clients thoroughly for court hearings and bankruptcy proceedings
Commits to timely return of calls and emails and keeping clients updated on case progress
cons: Services limited to Chicago metropolitan area; not available nationwide
Website does not disclose specific attorney credentials, bar standing, or disciplinary history
No fee structure or cost estimates provided on the website; clients must contact for pricing
Claims of 'hundreds of successful cases' and 'outstanding reviews' are not independently verified or linked on the website
No information about payment plans or financial accessibility for clients already in financial distress
best_for: Chicago-area residents facing creditor lawsuits, wage garnishment, or foreclosure seeking bankruptcy protection
Individuals with significant student loan debt exploring federal or private loan relief options
People experiencing creditor harassment who need immediate legal intervention and protection
Homeowners at risk of foreclosure after job loss or income reduction
diagnosis: This firm is best for Chicago-area residents experiencing severe financial distress (lawsuits, garnishment, foreclosure, creditor harassment) who qualify for and can afford bankruptcy filing. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to the Chicago market and the lack of transparent fee information; prospective clients must contact the firm directly to understand actual costs and payment feasibility.
services: Student loan relief negotiation and options counseling
Creditor harassment defense and cease communication enforcement
Federal student loan assistance (deferment, forbearance, consolidation, discharge)
Private and state student loan relief assistance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
